workiqQueriesRun: Give me a comprehensive analysis of ALL my M365 activity from the past 7 days across email, meetings, Teams chats, and documents.

signals.title: Large Knowledge-Sharing Forums
signals.rawExcerpt: CAPE Architecture Call, Copilot Studio Office Hours, BizChat Offline Eval Office Hour. Pattern: Listen, ask clarifying questions, redirect people to docs or follow-up syncs.

signals.title: V-Team Cross-Org Alignment Syncs
signals.rawExcerpt: Weekly Project Crucible, CAPE Compete, Customer Engagement Sync. Pattern: status review, gap identification, ownership assignment.

signals.title: Deep Technical Working Sessions
signals.rawExcerpt: Golden Evals kickoff, Actionability brainstorm, BIC AI Project Crucible. Pattern: problem framing, whiteboard/transcript, artifact creation.

signals.title: Camp AIR Multi-Day Immersive Block
signals.rawExcerpt: Full-day bookings with multiple sub-sessions. Drives most of the chat + document churn this week.

signals.title: Azure DevOps Notification Streams
signals.rawExcerpt: Tasks, requirements, epics related to Evals, Coverage, Jailing, IcM. High-volume, low-interaction stream.

signals.title: Leadership and Program Announcements
signals.rawExcerpt: EvalCon announcement, internal previews. Pattern: broadcast email, Teams discussion, action item.

signals.title: Customer and Field Coordination Threads
signals.rawExcerpt: Topics: eval adoption, CRM tracking, customer playbooks. Often escalate into 1:1 or small group meetings.

signals.title: Security and Compliance Alerts
signals.rawExcerpt: File-level alerts for credentials or keys. Pattern: alert, manual file fix.

signals.title: Eval Strategy and Actionability Discussions
signals.rawExcerpt: Repeated across multiple threads. Pattern: question, conceptual answer, link to repo/doc, offer meeting.

signals.title: Artifact Exchange in Chat
signals.rawExcerpt: Frequent sharing of GitHub repos, SharePoint links, zips, dashboards. Chat acts as a transport layer.

signals.title: Meeting Coordination and Conflict Resolution
signals.rawExcerpt: Rescheduling, partial attendance, joining late due to Camp AIR. Pattern repeats daily.

signals.title: Mentorship and Peer Sense-Making
signals.rawExcerpt: Explaining concepts (eval-driven development, orchestration, models). Converts confusion into shared mental models.

signals.title: Eval Frameworks and Tooling Artifacts
signals.rawExcerpt: Dashboards, scenario libraries, skill-detector packages. Often created after meetings, then shared in Teams.

signals.title: Presentation Decks (PowerPoint)
signals.rawExcerpt: Pitch decks, enablement decks, Camp AIR materials. Pattern: deck draft, review in chat, reuse across meetings.

signals.title: Loop Documents as Living Coordination Hubs
signals.rawExcerpt: Used for ownership, agenda, summaries. Often referenced across meetings and chats.

signals.title: Cross-Source: Announcement to Chat to Submission
signals.rawExcerpt: Email: EvalCon announcement. Chat: brainstorm what to present. Outcome: content proposal action item.

signals.title: Cross-Source: Customer Signal to Meeting to Toolkit
signals.rawExcerpt: Chat/email: customer eval pain points. Meeting: actionability brainstorm. Doc: playbooks, prototypes, dashboards.

signals.title: Cross-Source: DevOps Signal to Passive Intake to Synthesis
signals.rawExcerpt: Email: ADO notifications. No immediate response. Concepts reappear later in meetings or docs.

signals.title: Cross-Source: Camp AIR to Transcript to Reusable Guidance
signals.rawExcerpt: Meeting (transcribed). Shared Loop / deck / repo. Referenced later in other forums.
